summary: Promoted the runtime-only main tree from origin/dev using the repository promotion workflow.
Added a custom Woonggon Kim proprietary license and linked it from README and package.json.
not_changed: No Apache/MIT style license was applied.
No direct manual dev-to-main merge was used.
No cleanup of local artifact noise in the original working tree.
validations: Inspected failed direct merge path and switched to scripts/promote-main-runtime.sh.
Verified LICENSE, README.md, and package.json in the promotion worktree.
risks: Future runtime promotions must continue preserving the license change.
This is a custom proprietary license, not an OSI-approved open-source license.
recommendation: Use the runtime-only promotion workflow for future dev-to-main promotions and keep the root LICENSE as the source of truth.
